text: {"challenges":[{"challengeType":"missing-source","targetKind":"claim","targetIndex":59,"topic":"ethical approval documentation or citation of the University Ethics Committee's approval letter","rationale":"The claim that the study was conducted in line with ethical standards and received approval from the University Ethics Committee is presented without any supporting citation, document, or reference. Without verifiable evidence, such as a copy of the approval letter, an ethics protocol number, or a public registry entry, the assertion lacks substantiation and cannot be confirmed as true.","suggestedRemedy":"Provide a verifiable source: e.g., a citation to the ethics approval number, a link to the committee’s public record, or an appendix containing the approval letter confirming compliance with ethical standards."}]}
